name: Chocolate Yum Yum Cake
recipeInstructions:
Bottom Layer:
1. Mix the cake mix and pecans according to package instructions.
2. Press mixture into a 9 x 13 inch pan.
Top Layer:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese, powdered sugar, eggs, and vanilla until smooth.
2. Spread the batter evenly over the bottom layer.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 40 minutes.
4. Cut into small bars.
Coconut Pound Cake:
1. Cream together the butter and shortening until smooth.
2. Add sugar gradually, beating well after each addition.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the flour, baking powder, milk, and coconut flavoring alternately with the egg mixture.
4. Mix in half of the coconut flakes.
5. Place batter in an 8-inch tube pan.
6. Bake at 300 degrees F (150 degrees C) for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
7. Cool in the pan before removing.
Frosting:
1. Melt the butter and stir in the milk until smooth.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar, stirring after each addition.
3. If the frosting is too thick, add more milk, 1 teaspoon at a time.
Assembly:
1. Spread the frosting evenly over the cooled cake bars.
